title: Lucnoxity TierList TierTagger
description: This is the Lucnoxity TierList TierTagger. Which will work for versions 1.20 and above.
body:
This is the Lucnoxity TierList Tier Tagger, in which works for 1.20+ Versions for ALL CLIENTS. This will show tiers from LT5-HT1 in 13 different gamemodes. Crystal PvP, Sword PvP, UHC PvP, Axe PvP, SMP PvP, Mace PvP, Netherite Pot PvP, Diamond Pot PvP, Crystal (Evaluation Kit Only), DiamondSMP PvP, Cart PvP, Bow PvP, Creeper PvP.

**Some Additional Information**
- This mod allow for people who have been tested on Lucnoxitu TierList & Lucnoxity SubTierList for them to be able to see their tier earned ingame. Which can allow for them to see other people who have tested and there tier directly ingame, as well as othehrs able to see their own.
- As well as this the mod allows a /luctiers (gamemode) command in which allows you to select which of the 13 Minecraft PvP gamemodes (CPVP, SWORD, UHC, AXE, SMP, MACE, NETHERITE POT, DIAMOND POT, Crystal Evaluation Kit Only, DiamondSMP, Cart, Bow, Creeper) whichever one is selected is the one of which tier you will always see. The default selection is CPVP upon joining and will have to use the command to switch.
- You can also do /tiersearch (username) to see the list of users gamemodes and tiers they are tested on.
- You can also go to mod menu and LucTiers tiertagger mod settings to adjust some setting/colours of the mod.
- If your wondering, you would want to download this for these reasons. It allows you to showcase your own tier ingame from Lucnoxity TierList. As well as It allows you to see other peoples tier from Lucnoxity TierList.

For the Mod To work you need ukulib mod.

JOIN THE DISCORD HERE FOR THE TIERLIST: https://discord.gg/luctierlist ! https://discord.gg/lucsubtierlist
